atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports chronic abdominal pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports abdominal pain primarily in the mid-abdomen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports abdominal pain for approximately two years

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports alternating constipation and explosive diarrhea

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain being more prominent during constipation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain being intermittent

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports certain foods triggering diarrhea

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no nausea

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a stable weight

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports having lost approximately 25 pounds

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a sister with irritable bowel syndrome

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a family history of gastrointestinal cancers

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a family history of liver disease

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes Crestor daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a possible irritable bowel syndrome or other gastrointestinal disorder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Liver enlargement warrants further investigation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's history of slightly elevated liver enzymes requires follow-up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order laboratory tests including a comprehensive metabolic panel and liver function tests.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a liver ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Counsel the patient to discuss Crestor with his primary care physician and explore alternative medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend a fiber supplement to manage constipation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise the patient to increase water intake to at least 48 ounces daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks to review test results and assess symptom improvement.
